user.title: Milieu Labs AC – Login
user.description: Enter your Milieu Labs account credentials.

select_shadow.title: Milieu Labs AC – Select Device
select_shadow.description: Found {hub_count} hub(s) and {lvr_count} LVR(s). Select the devices to use.

reauth_confirm.title: Milieu Labs AC – Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please enter your Milieu Labs account credentials again.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Milieu Labs. Check your network and try again.

abort.no_devices: No Milieu Labs devices were found on this account.
